code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

match list.max(nums)
when Some(m)
  println("max=#{m}")
when None
  ()
end
match list.min(nums)
when Some(n)
  println("min=#{n}")
when None
  ()
end
